title: The Dark Prophecy of Lunchbox Day
cover_description: A lunchbox oozing neon-green yogurt, with a sandwich and apple fused into its gooey mass, eyes peering out.
host_intro: Tonight, Shadow reveals the terrifying truth about... Tuesdays.
host_outro: Shadow still hasn’t opened their yogurt. It’s Thursday.
script:
[TITLE: The Dark Prophecy of Lunchbox Day]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Shadow reveals the terrifying truth about... Tuesdays.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Shadow still hasn’t opened their yogurt. It’s Thursday.]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: mysterious_witch]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sarcastic_commentary]

[SETUP]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, gentle] Behold, child. The day the ancients feared most. [STING: witch_ominous]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: confident] Tuesday. The day the lunchbox appears. [STING: buildup_short]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: deadpan] No one knows where it comes from. It just... is. [STING: silence]

[BEAT_1]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: suspicious] First, the sandwich. Wrapped in foil like a cursed artifact. [STING: tiny]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] It is always... slightly squished. As if the bread itself fears its fate. [STING: deflation]

[BEAT_2]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: pressing] Then, the fruit. A single apple. Shiny. Too shiny. [STING: medium_hit]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: stunned] It rolls. It *always* rolls. Straight into the abyss of the backpack’s darkest corner. [STING: whoosh]

[BEAT_3]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] And finally... the yogurt. The true horror. [STING: buildup_long]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous] It sits. It waits. It *multiplies*. [STING: witch_dramatic]

[BUTTON]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]By Friday, the lunchbox is a sentient, gelatinous blob of forgotten meals.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: big_crash]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: deadpan] And yet... you bring it home again. [STING: deflation]

[COVER: A lunchbox oozing neon-green yogurt, with a sandwich and apple fused into its gooey mass, eyes peering out.]
[PREMISE: The horror of packed lunches]
